schemas.FULL_NAME_DESCRIPTION: Full name and surname according to the legal registry or identity provider.
schemas.EMAIL_DESCRIPTION: Primary electronic mail address linked to the sovereign account.
schemas.AVATAR_DESCRIPTION: URL address of the profile image retrieved from the social provider.
schemas.TRUST_LEVEL_DESCRIPTION: Algorithmic coefficient that determines the weight of user actions on the network.

errors.INVALID_AVATAR_URL: The profile photograph address does not meet security standards.
errors.TRUST_LEVEL_OUT_OF_BOUNDS: Trust level must be between 0.0 and 1.0.
errors.IDENTITY_NOT_FOUND: No citizen identity was found with the provided criteria.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED_PROVIDER: The requested social identity provider is not authorized by the NGO.
